title: crepidomanes bilabiatum
intro: Crepidomanes bilabiatum, also known as the bilabiate spleenwort or two-lipped spleenwort, is a type of fern species in the family Hymenophyllaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Crepidomanes bilabiatum include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Crepidomanes bilabiatum are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
